Hero.eyebrow: Science-based feed additives · Made in Europe
Hero.sub: Pioneering feed additives that empower livestock to thrive — and farmers to grow with confidence.

Mission.label: Our mission
Mission.title: We safeguard feed, sustain performance, and help producers manage what matters.

items.title: Safeguard the feed
items.body: Mycotoxins, oxidation, contamination — we neutralise the threats your animals never see.

items.title: Sustain performance
items.body: Phytogenic and enzymatic technologies keep growth on curve, even when conditions push back.

items.title: Manage production cost
items.body: Better feed conversion, less variability — measurable returns barn after barn.

Products.label: Three product lines
Products.title: Specialty additives, engineered to work in concert.

Contact.label: Become a partner
Contact.title: Challenges are inevitable. Support is here.
Contact.body: Tell us what you produce and where you produce it — a Nutrex specialist will get back to you within two business days.

Footer.tagline: Science-based feed additives, made in Europe.

Product.ctaBody: Request a sample, technical data sheet, or a call with our species specialist.
